markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 14.7. FLAMMABLE AND COMBUSTIBLE LIQUIDS [34000 - 34100]
#### Article 1. Administration [34000 - 34006]
##### § 34001

The provisions of this division refer to vehicles having a cargo tank and to hazardous waste transport vehicles and containers, as defined in Section 25167.4 of the Health and Safety Code, that are operating on highways within this state.

*(Amended by Stats. 1997, Ch. 945, Sec. 28. Effective January 1, 1998.)*

subsections.text: The provisions of this division refer to vehicles having a cargo tank and to hazardous waste transport vehicles and containers, as defined in Section 25167.4 of the Health and Safety Code, that are operating on highways within this state.
